caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and large over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone and is looking slightly to his left. Behind him, a white wall features repeated text and star graphics, including the phrases "GRIND" and "HUSTLE," while a dark background to the right displays the text "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics are present in the lower corners, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another that says "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he appears to be speaking or listening. The lighting and background remain constant, and there are no other people visible in the scene.
